Welcome to the future of open decentralized leveraged trading.

The first-of-its-kind oracle architecture utilizes Pyth data to provide real-time signed asset prices for trading, making it the fastest and most reliable on-chain leveraged trading platform.

Coinbase app

Connect with your Coinbase account

  1. Open Coinbase Wallet app
  2. Tap Scan

Or try the Coinbase Wallet browser extension

  • Connect with dapps with just one click on your desktop browser
  • Add an additional layer of security by using a supported Ledger hardware wallet
